files.emptyHint: Pick a folder to start AI-powered renaming
files.tooMany: Too many files, loaded first {{max}} of {{total}}

welcome.title: Welcome to Fyla
welcome.subtitle: AI-powered smart file renaming
welcome.step1Desc: Works with local Ollama or any OpenAI-compatible API
welcome.step2Desc: Auto-categorize sorts renamed files into subfolders by type
welcome.step3Desc: Fyla can auto-watch a folder and rename new files as they appear
welcome.step4Desc: All set! Drop files or wait for new files in your watch folder — Fyla will rename them automatically.
welcome.watchOptional: This step is optional. You can configure it later in Settings.

empty.title: Drop files here to rename
empty.subtitle: Supports PDF · Word · PPT · Excel · TXT · Markdown · JPG · PNG · HEIC · WebP · TIFF

papers.title: Batch Paper Reviews
papers.subtitle: Pick research PDFs to start reading automatically, generate structured Markdown reviews, and save them to your local papers library.
papers.queueSubtitle: Use full local PDF extraction and a stronger model to generate and archive each paper as readable Markdown.
papers.emptySubtitle: Batch multiple papers, start reading automatically after import, save each result as Markdown, and open the full review in a dedicated reader page.
papers.markdownUnavailable: No Markdown is available for this review
papers.duplicateSkipped: Those PDFs are already in the queue
papers.configRequired: Set up your Paper Reading model in Settings first
papers.onlyPdf: The Papers page currently supports PDFs only
papers.previewStreaming: The model is still generating. This page is showing the live preview.
papers.waitingPreview: Generation has started. Waiting for the first previewable chunk...
papers.historyEmptySubtitle: Completed paper reviews will appear here and remain available after restarting the app.
papers.chatPlaceholder: Ask a question, or type @ to choose sources / paste images…
papers.chatSendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift + Enter for a new line
papers.chatEmpty: Keep exploring this paper with follow-up questions.
papers.chatPreparingBody: The first question parses the paper text first; larger papers may also build retrieval cache, so this first turn can be slower.
papers.chatUsesFullContext: AI answers with the full paper context and selected sources
papers.chatPdfRenderTimeout: PDF viewer initialization timed out. Try switching views and opening it again.
papers.chatPdfMissing: The source PDF is not available
papers.chatReportMissing: No review report is currently available
papers.chatWindowSubtitle: Open a paper conversation from the main reader and it will appear here.
papers.chatHistoryScope: Only sessions from this paper are shown here
papers.chatHistoryEmpty: No sessions for this paper yet.
papers.chatHistoryContinue: Your next follow-up will continue after “{{label}}”.
papers.chatImageVlmDisabled: Enable VLM in Settings before attaching images to paper chat.
papers.chatImageLimitReached: You can attach up to {{count}} images per turn.
papers.chatImagePasteUnsupported: No usable image was found in the clipboard.
papers.chatStarterContribution: What is the paper's main contribution?
papers.chatStarterMethod: Can you summarize the method section?
papers.chatStarterEvidence: What is the strongest experimental evidence?

settings.customRulesHint: Tell the AI how to name files, e.g. use "client-doctype-date" format
settings.customRulesPlaceholder: e.g. Use English, format as "vendor-invoice-date", date as YYYY-MM-DD, no spaces
settings.enableVlmHint: Prefer vision model for image files
settings.reuseLlmHint: Use the same model and key as AI Provider
settings.watchFolderHint: Auto-analyze new files (e.g. your Downloads folder)
settings.autoCategorizeHint: Auto-sort files into subfolders by type (Images / Documents / PDFs / Archives)
settings.enableWatchHint: Auto-watch for new files in the folder
settings.setWatchFirst: Please set a watch folder first
settings.paperReadingIntro: Used only when you manually start a task from Papers. Best for full-paper structured reviews with a stronger model.
settings.paperModelSectionIntro: Configure the chat model and connection used for paper reviews.
settings.paperConnectionHint: Verify the paper-reading model connection and credentials.
settings.paperArchiveSectionIntro: Choose where generated Markdown reviews are saved.
settings.paperArchiveBrowseHint: Results are saved into projects/ or inbox/ and can also be copied as raw Markdown.
settings.paperServerUrlHint: Ollama endpoint used for paper reviews
settings.paperBaseUrlHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint used for paper reviews
settings.paperModelHint: Prefer a stronger long-context model for full-paper reviews
settings.paperReviewPromptHint: Edit the review template in a modal. Only the editable body changes; the output protocol stays fixed.
settings.paperReviewPromptLocked: The output protocol, metadata JSON, and Markdown markers are locked. Only the paper-review template body is customizable, and paper chat is unaffected.
settings.paperReviewPromptResetDone: Paper review prompt reset to default
settings.paperEmbeddingIntro: PDF Chat prefers full-text prompts first. Retrieval only kicks in when the paper is too large for the chat context budget.
settings.paperEmbeddingAutoHint: Auto mode prefers local Ollama `nomic-embed-text`, then falls back to OpenAI-compatible embeddings.
settings.paperEmbeddingOllamaUrlHint: Ollama endpoint used for local embeddings
settings.paperEmbeddingBaseUrlHint: OpenAI-compatible endpoint used for cloud embeddings
settings.paperEmbeddingModelHint: OpenAI-compatible embedding model, for example text-embedding-3-small
settings.paperFulltextTokenLimitHint: If the estimated token count stays below this limit, PDF Chat sends the full document directly.
settings.paperArchiveRootHint: Reviews are saved into projects/ or inbox/ under this path
settings.embeddingModelHint: Paper chat retrieval uses a local embedding model (~{{size}}). Downloads prefer the domestic mirror and automatically fall back to the official source if needed.
settings.embeddingDownloadFailed: Failed to download local retrieval model
settings.embeddingImportFailed: Failed to import local retrieval model
settings.embeddingMissing: The local retrieval model has not been downloaded yet.

errors.ollamaNotRunning: Ollama is not running. Run "ollama serve" in terminal
errors.ollamaConnFailed: Cannot connect to Ollama. Check the URL in Settings
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Model may be too large or network issue
errors.unauthorized: Authentication failed. Check your API Key
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again later
errors.serverError: AI service error. Try again later
errors.modelNotFound: Model not found. Check the model name in Settings
errors.fileExists: A file with the same name already exists
errors.fileNotFound: Source file has been moved or deleted
errors.pdfExtractFailed: Failed to extract PDF content. File may be corrupted or encrypted
errors.emptyFilename: AI could not extract useful info. Try renaming manually
errors.paperParseFailed: Failed to parse the paper review result. Check whether the model can return stable JSON
errors.invalidExternalUrl: This link is not allowed to open externally
errors.openExternalFailed: Failed to open the link in your browser

updater.checkFailed: Update check failed, try again later
